differential_diagnoses: Severe sepsis due to community-acquired pneumonia
Acute viral hepatitis (A, B, C, or E)
next_steps: Perform peripheral blood smear examination for Babesia and malaria
Send serum and urine for Hantavirus testing
Send comprehensive viral hepatitis panel (HAV, HBV, HCV, HEV)
Obtain urine sediment analysis and monitoring of intake/output for renal failure management
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for infectious disease workup (culture, stains, PCR) if respiratory status permits
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics and provide organ-supportive care, including renal replacement therapy if indicated
